channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, and tech headlines.

item.title: The Analogue Pocket will be back in stock and slightly more expensive
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Analogue announced a restock for its Pocket handheld, but for the second time since late 2021, it's getting a price bump, this time to $239.99. The Pocket will once again be available for preorder through Analogue's website in black or white (the brightly colored versions are always limited editions that sell out fast) starting on […]

item.title: Starmer says UK involvement in US strikes on Iran is ‘defensive
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Keir Starmer framed his decision to allow US use of British military bases to strike Iran as “defensive."

item.title: Sikh group in Canada slams India over new report into 2023 activist killing
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Globe and Mail report alleges Indian consular officials in Vancouver tied to Hardeep Singh Nijjar's assassination.

item.title: Magic Keyboard cases for the latest iPad Pro are up to $85 off
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple’s Magic Keyboard cases offer a fantastic typing experience, elevating the iPad to laptop status with a large trackpad that offers haptic feedback, and an articulating hinge to help you angle the display just right for your comfort. It’s typically a very pricey accessory, but Woot has new / open-box models selling at great discounts […]

item.title: X ads ‘Paid Partnership’ labels for creators so they can ditch the hashtags
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The new labels comply with regulations and allow creators to be more transparent with their followers.

item.title: Qatar says it downed two Iranian fighter jets as conflict widens
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
This is a breaking news story.

item.title: HBO Max and Paramount Plus could become one streamer
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Now that Paramount Skydance has become the frontrunner to buy Warner Bros. Discovery, CEO David Ellison wants the two studios' streaming services to become one. During a call with investors on Monday, Paramount Skydance head David Ellison insisted that, if his deal to acquire the entirety of Warner Bros. Discovery for about $110 billion receives […]

item.title: Iran demands international action after attacks impact hospitals, schools
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Hospitals across Iran have been damaged by US, Israeli strikes - but no reports of direct hits yet.

item.title: Hacktivists claim to have hacked Homeland Security to release ICE contract data
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
A hacking group called Department of Peace said they hacked a specific office within Homeland Security to protest ICE’s mass deportation campaign, and the companies aiding it.

item.title: M’sia, France in final phase of new defence agreement
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Defence minister Khaled Nordin says this was discussed during a courtesy call by new French ambassador Marc Abensour today.

item.title: Over 1bil e-invoices issued by 200,000-plus traders
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The finance ministry says this indicates a positive level of acceptance for the initiative.

item.title: Qatar LNG, Saudi refinery, Israeli oil, gas fields down due to Mideast strikes
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
QatarEnergy, 82% of whose clients are Asian, was set to declare force majeure on liquefied natural gas shipments after Iranian drone attacks on Ras Laffan facilities.

item.title: Samsung’s Digital Home Key lets you use your phone as your key
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Just days after showing off the Galaxy S26, Samsung is finally rolling out the ability for users to unlock their home with a tap of their phone or by simply approaching their door. The new feature, called Digital Home Key, will live inside Samsung Wallet and is powered by the Aliro smart home standard. Samsung […]

item.title: Atletico’s Simeone wary of wounded Barca despite healthy lead in Cup tie
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
A 4-0 lead going into the second leg of their Copa del Rey semi-final tie at Barcelona offers little comfort for Atletico Madrid manager Diego Simeone.

item.title: The best mobile tech announced at MWC 2026 so far
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Mobile World Congress 2026 opened its doors today in Barcelona, Spain, but some of the biggest announcements from the mobile-focused show were already made over the weekend. To make sure you don't miss the best new smartphones, laptops, concepts, and accessories, we're rounding up all the most newsworthy gadgets that have debuted so far at […]

item.title: Ahli Parlimen perjelas tak hadir undi RUU had tempoh jawatan PM
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Syed Abu Hussin Hafiz kata beliau tidak bersetuju dengan pindaan dicadangkan itu, manakala Larry Sng kata terperangkap dalam kesesakan lalu lintas.

item.title: Qatar halts natural gas production after Iranian attacks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Qatar is halting liquid natural gas (LNG) production because of Iranian attacks on key facilities.

item.title: 2 govt MPs explain absence in vote to limit PM’s tenure
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bukit Gantang MP Syed Abu Hussin Hafiz Syed Abdul Fasal says he did not vote because he disagreed with the proposed law, while Julau MP Larry Sng says he was stuck in traffic.

item.title: Malaysian actor part of latest ‘Bridgerton’ season
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Miri-born Zheng Xi Yong plays Lord Barnaby in the series streaming on Neflix.

item.title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.

item.title: Apple launches iPhone 17e with prices starting at US$599
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Apple is willing to absorb some component cost pressure to make its lowest-priced model more compelling.

item.title: Apple speeds up the iPad Air with an M4 upgrade, starting at $599
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Apple refreshes the iPad Air with the M4 chip and more memory to make it better for AI use cases.

item.title: Investigating the 61-pound machine that eats plastic and spits out bricks
item.description:
Source: The Verge
As a kid, I went door to door collecting cans to earn some pocket change. Today, I still take pride in recycling. I slice cardboard boxes down to size each Sunday, and make sure every viable plastic container winds up in my family's recycling bins. Sometimes I even pull cellophane windows out of paper envelopes, […]

item.title: Why killing Khamenei isn’t the death of Iran’s Islamic Republic
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US officials have celebrated the killing of Iran’s Supreme Leader as the end of the Islamic Republic.

item.title: Apple bakes in AI smarts into its new $599 iPhone 17e
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The base model comes with 256 GB of storage, which Apple says is twice the entry storage from the previous generation at the same starting price.

item.title: Three US fighter jets ‘mistakenly’ shot down over Kuwait
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
CENTCOM says three fighter jets 'mistakenly shot down'. Kuwait investigating cause of incident.

item.title: UK’s Cyprus military base comes under attack amid Middle East war
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
An Iranian drone hit the runway of the UK's Akrotiri air force base.

item.title: Cops detain 49 Indonesian migrants in waters off Sabak Bernam
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bukit Aman CID director M Kumar says they were on their way to Tanjung Balai in North Sumatra.

item.title: Woodlands Gateway project to strengthen JS-SEZ connectivity
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Singapore says the first phase of the development is expected to be completed around 2030.

item.title: What is Iran’s military strategy? How has it changed since June 2025 war?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Defence analysts tell Al Jazeera that Iran has revised its military strategy since 12-day war with Israel.

item.title: Bekas menteri antara tak hadir untuk undi RUU had tempoh jawatan PM
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Hishammuddin Hussein dan M Saravanan dikatakan antara mereka yang tidak hadir semasa pengundian RUU had tempoh jawatan PM.

item.title: Bersih raps opposition for abstaining on bill to limit PM’s tenure
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The electoral reform group says political differences should have been set aside in the best interest of the nation.

item.title: How OpenAI caved to the Pentagon on AI surveillance
item.description:
Source: The Verge
On Friday evening, amidst fallout from a standoff between the Department of Defense and Anthropic, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman announced that his own company had successfully negotiated new terms with the Pentagon. The US government had just moved to blacklist Anthropic for standing firm on two red lines for military use: no mass surveillance of […]

item.title: Hegseth: US didn’t start war with Iran, but we are ‘finishing it’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Blaming Iran for previous attacks on Americans in the region, Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth defended recent strikes.

item.title: Video shows Iranian missile strike hit Beersheba, Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
CCTV footage shows the moment an Iranian missile struck a neighbourhood in Beersheba, Israel.

item.title: Hackers and internet outages hit Iran amid U.S. air strikes
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Users of a popular Iranian prayer app were flooded with phone notifications as U.S. air strikes hit Iran's biggest cities, killing the country's leader.

item.title: Bersih persoal Ahli Parlimen tak sokong RUU baik untuk negara
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bersih turut mempersoalkan Ahli Parlimen yang tidak hadir dalam sesi untuk RUU had tempoh jawatan PM.

item.title: Apple announces the iPhone 17E
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple has taken the wraps off the iPhone 17E, its latest entry-level smartphone. The iPhone 17E starts at $599 with a higher 256GB of storage, and is available in black, white, and pink. The company revealed the new device as part of a series of announcements that kicked off this week. Similar to the iPhone […]

item.title: ‘Outrage over US-Israel attacks on Iran may have sparked violence in Texas’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Javed Ali warns that anger over US-Israel attacks on Iran may be fuelling 'homegrown violence'.

item.title: MyFitnessPal has acquired Cal AI, the viral calorie app built by teens
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
After wooing Cal AI for months, MyFitnessPal has successfully acquired its up-and-coming rival, Cal AI, the app built by teens soaring on the apps stores.

item.title: Parade’s Cami Tellez announces new creator economy marketing platform, $4M in funding
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Cami Tellez announces launch of new company, $4 million raise.

item.title: Apple launches a new iPad Air with an upgraded M4 processor
item.description:
Source: The Verge
After updating its mid-level tablets last year, Apple has announced a new version of the iPad Air today now powered by the company's M4 processor. That's the same processor found in the 7th-generation iPad Pro as well as MacBook Pro and Mac mini models that debuted in 2024. The new iPad Air with M4 is […]

item.title: Pakistan calls troops, orders 3-day curfew as 24 killed in pro-Iran rallies
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Army deployed and few areas in northern Gilgit-Baltistan region put under curfew after violence over Khamenei's killing.

item.title: Warga emas ditemukan maut selepas tetak orang
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Lelaki berusia 68 tahun yang disyaki suspek ditemukan meninggal dunia di sebuah rumah.

item.title: 2 ex-ministers among those absent from vote to limit PM’s term
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Hishammuddin Hussein and M Saravanan, both from BN, were among eight MPs from the government bloc missing from the house.

item.title: Will the US-Israeli attacks impact Iran’s participation in World Cup 2026?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
With World Cup cohost US and Iran engaged in conflict, Team Melli's tournament participation is thrown into doubt.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude reports widespread outage
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Anthropic's AI chatbot Claude experienced widespread service disruptions on Monday morning, with thousands of users reporting issues accessing the bot.

item.title: Man suspected of slashing acquaintance later found dead
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Police discover body in kitchen of house after victim reports being slashed in restaurant at Pulau Tikus, Penang.

item.title: Gas prices soar as QatarEnergy halts LNG production after Iran attacks
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
This comes after Saudi Arabia announced the temporary closure of one of its largest oil facilities following drone attacks.

item.title: Iran conflict widens to Lebanon, Kuwait mistakenly shoots down US jets
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
All six crew members of the American F-15E fighters were safely recovered.

item.title: Trump ‘very disappointed’ with UK’s Starmer for blocking use of air bases
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
US President Donald Trump was disappointed with British Prime Minister Keir Starmer for not allowing the US to use the Diego Garcia air base to carry out strikes on Iran.

item.title: Israel intensifies war on Lebanon after Hezbollah attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel's response to Hezbollah attack kills at least 31 people and leads to mass displacement in Lebanon.

item.title: Syarikat umrah susun semula penerbangan, tanggung kos tambahan
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Beberapa syarikat pengendali umrah menukar penerbangan jemaah yang terkandas di Madinah dan Jeddah akibat situasi semasa di Asia Barat.

item.title: Nearly 170 people killed in attack in South Sudan’s Ruweng, officials say
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Separately, MSF says 26 humanitarian workers are missing following recent violence in South Sudan's Jonglei state.

item.title: ‘Israel has been provoking Hezbollah to react for a while’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
‘Israel has been provoking Hezbollah to react for a while’

item.title: Myanmar grants amnesty to over 7,000 convicted of ‘terrorist group’ support
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Pro-democracy activists backing detained elected figurehead Aung San Suu Kyi and armed groups challenging the military in a civil war have been labelled ‘terrorist’ outfits.

item.title: MyTax portal restored, operating normally
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Inland Revenue Board says it has received more than 320,000 B and BE forms from individual taxpayers for the 2025 assessment year since the e-Filing service was opened yesterday.

item.title: Barcelona vs Atletico Madrid – Copa del Rey semifinal: Time, team news
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Barcelona face the gargantuan task of overturning a 4-0 defeat in the second leg of the semifinal tie at Camp Nou.

item.title: Loke disappointed over failure to pass bill on PM’s term limit
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The DAP secretary-general says all 40 MPs from his party were present to support the constitutional amendment.

item.title: Anthony Loke denounces absent lawmakers after PM term limit Bill fails by just two votes
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — DAP secretary-general Anthony Loke has called on civil society and voters to punish lawmak...

item.title: Why has the UAE closed its stock exchanges?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Authorities have shut main exchanges in Abu Dhabi and Dubai amid ongoing fallout of US-Israeli attacks on Iran.

item.title: What’s happening in Lebanon as Iran war spills over
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Zeina Khodr breaks down what's been happening in Lebanon as the Iran conflict spills over.

item.title: 10 arrested in Bukit Kayu Hitam shooting case
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Kedah police chief Adzli Abu Shah says police are still tracing the weapons used in the Feb 25 incident.

item.title: Thousands of passengers stranded as Middle East airspace shuts
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Thousands of flights were cancelled after airspace shut down across much of the Middle East.

item.title: Preacher Firdaus Wong claims man in Quran desecration case is a Muslim convert who approached him
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
PETALING JAYA, March 2 – A controversial case of religious desecration has taken a surprising new turn, with promi...

item.title: At least 25 killed at Pakistan’s weekend pro-Iran protests
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The demonstrations against the death of Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei erupted in several major Pakistani cities, including Karachi.

item.title: Nigerians mourn killing of Iran’s Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Members of Nigeria’s Shia Muslim community are mourning Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei who was killed.

item.title: Ukraine to help down Iran’s drones: How Russia’s war rewrote the playbook
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Europe's biggest conflict since World War II has changed the nature of warfare, including today's Middle East crisis.

item.title: Wall Street futures slide as Middle East conflict expected to drag on
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
The Middle East conflict could persist for weeks, potentially disrupting global trade flows and adding to inflationary pressures.

item.title: Ten suspects held in Bukit Kayu Hitam AKPS commander shooting case
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
ALOR SETAR, March 2 — Police have so far arrested 10 suspects to assist in the shooting incident targeting a vehic...

item.title: Lebanese PM bans Hezbollah’s military activities after attack on Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Nawaf Salam says all Hezbollah activities are 'illegal' after the group launches attack on Israel from Lebanon.

item.title: Trump’s no-war promise vs Iran strikes
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
We compare and contrast Trump’s campaign anti-war rhetoric with his decision as president to launch strikes on Iran.

item.title: Ringgit ends lower amid Middle East tensions
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Expect the ringgit to remain soft against the US dollar in the near-term, says analyst.

item.title: Former SRC director denies role in RM42mil loss
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Azhar Osman Khairuddin says he had no personal knowledge of the disbursement of funds and the related transactions.

item.title: Two votes short: Move to limit PM tenure fails in Parliament amid high absenteeism
item.description:
Source: Malay Mail (Malaysia)
KUALA LUMPUR, March 2 — In a major blow to proposed democratic reforms, the Dewan Rakyat today failed to pass a co...

item.title: Smoke rises from US embassy, US warplanes crash in Kuwait
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
A US base and a power station were also targeted in what was the most dramatic escalation for the small Gulf country in decades.

item.title: RUU had tempoh PM gagal raih 2/3
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Pindaan Perlembagaan gagal raih sokongan 2/3 ahli Dewan Rakyat.

item.title: Dewan Rakyat fails to pass bill to cap PM’s tenure at 10 years
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Constitutional amendment falls short of two-thirds majority in bloc vote, despite 146 MPs backing it.

item.title: PM term limit bill falters, short of just 2 votes
item.description:
Source: Malaysiakini (EN News)
UPDATED 7.05PM | PARLIAMENT | 146 voted for the bill, 32 absent, 44 abstained.

item.title: Act impartially against those who insult religions, Sabah mufti says
item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Bungsu Aziz Jaafar says the authorities must be neutral to avoid accusations of double standards.
